## etude import

Import historical runs from an external source (e.g. GitHub PRs)

```
etude import [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --dry-run          print what would be imported without writing anything
      --from-github      import from GitHub PRs (required)
  -h, --help             help for import
      --last int         number of PRs to import (default 50)
      --message string   commit message prefix for each imported run ref
      --repo string      GitHub repo as owner/name (required)
      --state string     PR state to import: merged, closed, or all (default "merged")
```
